revision.comment: align prefix param with [[Template:Year in country category]] (auto-generates the if applicable)
revision.text:
<includeonly><!--
   -->{{Decade in country category/core
		| decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow deacade param for demonstration purposes -->
		| country = {{{1}}}
        | countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}
		| continent = {{{2|}}}
		| prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}
		| newname = {{{newname|{{{5|}}}}}}
		| othercontinent= {{{3|}}}
		| nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}
		| subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}
      }}<!--
--></includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
--></noinclude>

<includeonly><!--
   -->{{Decade in country category/core
		| decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow deacade param for demonstration purposes -->
		| country = {{{1}}}
        | countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}
		| continent = {{{2|}}}
		| prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}
		| newname = {{{newname|{{{5|}}}}}}
		| othercontinent= {{{3|}}}
		| nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}
		| subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}
      }}<!--
--></includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
--></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

<includeonly><!--
   -->{{Decade in country category/core
		| decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow deacade param for demonstration purposes -->
		| country = {{{1}}}
        | countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}
		| continent = {{{2|}}}
		| prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}
		| newname = {{{newname|{{{5|}}}}}}
		| othercontinent= {{{3|}}}
		| nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}
		| subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}
      }}<!--
--></includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
--></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><!--
   -->{{Decade in country category/core
		| decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow deacade param for demonstration purposes -->
		| country = {{{1}}}
        | countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}
		| continent = {{{2|}}}
		| prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}
		| newname = {{{newname|{{{5|}}}}}}
		| othercontinent= {{{3|}}}
		| nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}
		| subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}
      }}<!--
--></includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
--></noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

   -->{{Decade in country category/core

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><!--
   -->{{Decade in country category/core

		| country = {{{1}}}

--></noinclude>
<noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decade_in_country_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decade_in_country_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly><!--
   -->{{Decade in country category/core
		| decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow deacade param for demonstration purposes -->
		| country = {{{1}}}
        | countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}
		| continent = {{{2|}}}
		| prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}
		| newname = {{{newname|{{{5|}}}}}}
		| othercontinent= {{{3|}}}
		| nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}
		| subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}
      }}<!--
--></includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
-->
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decade_in_country_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{Decade in country category/core
		| decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} 
		| country = {{{1}}}
        | countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}
		| continent = {{{2|}}}
		| prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}
		| newname = {{{newname|{{{5|}}}}}}
		| othercontinent= {{{3|}}}
		| nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}
		| subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}
      }}</includeonly>{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
